manual_mismatches.issue: Included CATEGORYID_IS_REQUIRED which is not a categories endpoint validation.

Error focus included UNIT_NOT_FOUND though deterministic controller validation is NAME_IS_REQUIRED.
One prerequisite line remained in English in manual.sw.json.
